Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-16 FHFA Announces 2025 AMI Limits
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-16 14:32:11-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

FHFA has released new Area Median Income limits that go into effect 05/18/2025.  Attached is a spreadsheet that breaks down the AMI changes from 2024 to 2025 on a per county basis.  Please see the GSE messaging below:

 

Fannie Mae

Effective May 18, area median incomes (AMIs) for 2025 will be implemented in Desktop UnderwriterÂź (DUÂź) and HomeReadyÂź application programming interfaces, Loan Delivery, and the Area Median Income Lookup Tool. AMIs will continue to be applied in DU based on the casefile create date, while the Application Received Date provided in Loan Delivery will be used to determine which AMI limit to use when evaluating eligibility for the loan-level price adjustment waiver.

*	Visit the HomeReady Mortgage page <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/click.e.fanniemae.com/?qs=c660c67520a11668b8e6d4033ece42ea256e95eaa815ed4bcee193b4bbecb968af663da8fa7bac8a1b70b1fa90f6f500b30b92a7434c2cf5__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!RexRfh0oeJbCFJjJzFCaL2PN-_W7h553mQqtpZUi2y5_8pnb2ppmj4SgmCFChReYFl7P-_1_wUjaNvTMThF2EXM3E0FE8E8ULtGT$> 

 

Freddie Mac

Loan Product AdvisorÂź will be updated on May 18, 2025, to reflect the 2025 Area Median Income limits. In addition, the following tools will be updated on May 18, 2025, to reflect the updated limits:

*	Home PossibleÂź Income & Property Eligibility tool <https://sf.freddiemac.com/working-with-us/affordable-lending/home-possible-eligibility-map> 

For assessment of Credit Fee Caps and Credits, the Area Median Income Percent is calculated in Loan Selling AdvisorÂź and uses the following:

*	For Loan Product Advisor Mortgages, the higher Area Median Income as of the Note Date or the Area Median Income used in the last Loan Product Advisor submission

Attachments

*	Updated AMI spreadsheet

FOR MORE INFORMATIONâŠ 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting (jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
